prompt: A traditional Japanese 4-panel manga (4-koma) strip, vertical layout with panels stacked top-to-bottom, clean black ink linework on white. Title at the very top in bold Japanese gothic font: "プログラマあるある". Panel 1: a young female programmer at her desk staring at a laptop, speech bubble "なぜか動いた…!". Panel 2: same character with a thoughtful face, speech bubble "なぜ動くんだろう?". Panel 3: she edits the code, speech bubble "ちょっと整理しよう". Panel 4: she stares at the broken laptop with a deadpan face, speech bubble "なぜ動かない…!?". Soft screentone shading on backgrounds. Each panel has a clear black border. Author tag in the bottom-right corner: small text "ccskill gptimage".
